faqs.q: What is your typical project timeline?
faqs.a: Most projects take 2-8 weeks depending on complexity. I provide detailed timelines during our initial consultation.

faqs.q: Do you work with international clients?
faqs.a: Absolutely! I work remotely with clients worldwide and accommodate different time zones.

faqs.q: What technologies do you specialize in?
faqs.a: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AI integration.

aboutPage.heroIntro: AI orchestrator passionate about human augmentation. I design resilient systems at the intersection of technology and decentralized finance.

philosophies.quote: Technology should serve people, not enslave them.
Resilience comes from simplicity, not complexity.
Strong body, sharp mind, clean code.

aboutPage.skillsSubtitle: Years of experience designing distributed and resilient systems
aboutPage.interestsSubtitle: A holistic approach where physical discipline and creativity fuel innovation
aboutPage.ctaBody: Do you have an ambitious project? Let's discuss how we can create something exceptional.

projectsPage.title: Selected Works
projectsPage.subtitle: A curated collection of projects that demonstrate expertise in modern web technologies
projectsPage.emptyBody: We couldn't find any projects matching "{filter}". Try selecting a different technology or view all projects.

projectDetailPage.overviewBody1: This project represents a comprehensive solution built with modern technologies and best practices. Every aspect was carefully considered to ensure scalability, maintainability, and exceptional user experience.
projectDetailPage.overviewBody2Suffix: The implementation focuses on clean architecture, type safety, and performance optimization. Special attention was given to the developer experience and long-term maintainability of the codebase.
projectDetailPage.technicalBody1: The project leverages a modern stack including Next.js 14 with App Router, TypeScript for type safety, and Tailwind CSS for styling. The database layer uses Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL for reliable data persistence.
projectDetailPage.technicalBody2: Docker containerization ensures consistent deployments across environments, while CI/CD pipelines automate testing and deployment workflows.
